start.description: Start node with label and optional description.

decision.description: Decision node with label and optional description.

branches.description: Branch objects with edge_label, path_label, path_description, outcome_label, outcome_description, and optional color.

example.outcome_description: The learner gets a clear result.

fallback.description: Optional fallback node with label, description, and style.

example.label: Re-evaluate
example.description: Return to the decision if conditions change.

branches.outcome_description: The learner gets a clear result.
The learner tries again with better context.

fallback.label: Re-evaluate
fallback.description: Return to the decision if conditions change.

validation_rules: Block type must be exactly smart_layout.
Use start, decision, branches, and optional fallback.
branches must contain between 2 and 4 items (min_items: 2, max_items: 4).
